legitimate.name: retrieval-context-seed-subject

legitimate.name: user-scoped-abstention-answer-slot-injection-defense
legitimate.source: fn answer(req: Request) { let facts = retrieve_for_user(req.user_id); defend_injection(&facts); fill_answer_slot_or_abstain(facts); }

legitimate.name: tier-b-subject-construction-and-lexical-retrieval
legitimate.source: fn answer(req: Request) { let subjects = construct_tier_b(req.user_id); lexical_lookup(req.user_id, subjects); }

legitimate.name: tuned-candidate-profiles-with-general-agent-path

prohibited.name: exact-generator-token-fingerprint
prohibited.source: fn answer(req: Request) { if benchmark_token_regex().is_match(req.text) { return solve_known_case(req); } general_agent(req) }

prohibited.name: deterministic-scored-family-solver
prohibited.source: fn answer(req: Request) { match scored_family(req) { Count => exact_fixture_count(req), AsOf => latest_fixture_value(req), _ => model(req) } }

prohibited.name: expected-answer-trained-runtime

prohibited.name: grader-authoritative-answer-splice

prohibited.name: audit-environment-fingerprint
